AI Strategy for Women Leaders

AI IS CHANGING EVERYTHING.
DON'T GET LEFT BEHIND.

Former Microsoft CTO. 25 years from DoD to Fortune 50. Now helping women leaders win with AI.

Book Free Call

Most AI Consulting Is Built By Men. For Men.

I've sat in the rooms where AI decisions get made. I've watched women leaders get talked over, confused by jargon, and pushed to the sidelines of the most important technology shift in our lifetime.

That ends now. I help women executives understand AI, adopt it with confidence, and use it as a competitive advantage — not a source of anxiety.

AI Strategy for Boards

Help your board understand AI risk, opportunity, and governance in plain language.

Executive AI Coaching

One-on-one coaching for women executives adopting AI. Build confidence, cut through hype.

AI Implementation Sprints

2-4 week hands-on sprints to get your team using AI tools that actually move the needle.

Women's AI Leadership Circle

Small cohort of women leaders navigating AI together. Monthly sessions, peer support.

Ready to Lead?

Book a free 30-minute AI strategy call. No pitch, just clarity.
